title: Site Reliability Engineer I H1B Salary Data (2024) | H1BData.info
note: 4 records; median $120,700; Chewy (Bellevue WA) $117,400, F5 Networks (San Jose CA) $124,000, Shein (San Diego CA) $127,000, Movius Interactive (Alpharetta GA) $85,000. Represents entry-level SRE base salaries across company types.
